name: Grok 3
tagline: Trained with ~10x more compute than Grok 2; added explicit reasoning/thinking modes.
metaDescription: Grok 3 (xAI (Grok)), released 2025-02-17 — part of the Grok (flagship) line. Trained with ~10x more compute than Grok 2; added explicit reasoning/thinking mode…
overview: Grok 3 is a large language model from xAI (Grok), part of the Grok (flagship) line. Released 2025-02-17. xAI's main general-purpose chat and reasoning model line.
What's notable in this version: Trained with ~10x more compute than Grok 2; added explicit reasoning/thinking modes. Shipped with a smaller Grok 3 mini.
